titleStmt.title: SII 37.93: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 93. (A.R. No. 344 of 1938-39.) Chintakommudinne, Cuddapah Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab set up near the Gaṅgamma shrine on the north side of the tank bund.
This is dated Śaka 1669, Prabhava, Vaiśākha śu. 15, corresponding to 1747 A.D., May 13, Wednesday.

It records the gift of a land of 3 tūmus (muttumu) in extent by the reḍḍis and karaṇams of the village as khaṇḍa-dasavanda, to the Kāṁpus and Kammas. Since, the latter got the tank-bund of that village, which was in disrepairs, repaired by the masons. The deity Gaṅgamma, whose image was set up on the tank-bund, is cited as the witness to the transaction.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī vijayābhyudaya śālivāhanaśakava
rṣaṁbbulu 1669 Agunēṭi prabha
va nāma saṁvvatsara vaiśākha śudha
15 lu hajarālu darabaṁddigi divā
ṇālagāru ciṁttakommu diṁ
nnereḍḍi karaṇālu yī sthaḷaṁlō vuṁnna
kāpulaku kaṁmmavāriki vrā
yiṁcci yiccina caruvu dasavaṁ
dapu mānyaṁ . manavūri caruvu
kaṭṭa cidhilamaipōtūvuṁḍḍe ga
nuka Ākaṭṭamīda panicēśēṭa
ṭṭugānu mīku nirnayaṁ cēsti
mi ganuka mīru Ālāguna
nē kaṭṭamīda vaḍḍevāṁḍla cā
ta pani cēyiṁstiri ganuka mīku
mānyaṁ yiccina sthaḷaṁ ma
ḷḷa tūrpuna tuvva cēnu lō
muttumu mīku khaṁḍḍadsa
vaṁdhamugānu yistimi ganuka Ācē
nu mīru Accukaṭṭukoni nīrāraṁ
bhaṁ kāḍāraṁbhālu yēmi payirllu
peṭṭukuṁnnā nirācchēdanagā mīpu
tra pautra pāraṁpariyaṁttaramu
gānu sarvamānyadasavaṁdamugā
nu naḍipiṁccagalavāramu .

yiṁddulaku ya
varu Ācchēdana
cēśinaḍipiṁcca
kapōyinā
kāśi paṭṭaṇama
ṁddu gōhatya cēsina ṣu vaṁ
ṭṭa pātakāna pōduru . Iṁduku sākṣi kaṭṭa mī
di gaṁgamma .
Digital edition of SII 37.93 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
